name: Scotch Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except soda crackers in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil and cook for one minute.
3. Remove from heat, add the soda crackers, and return to a boil for another minute.
4. Pour mixture into a prepared pie crust.
5. Prepare topping by mixing 1/4 cup melted butter with the remaining ingredients until crumbly.
6. Sprinkle topping over the filling.
7. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes, then reduce temperature to 325°F (165°C) and bake an additional 15 minutes.
